objective: Build an explicit release readiness >=8/10 gate and integrate SIL/VIL/HIL evidence into the release process.
validation_commands: ao vibe-check --since 1d --json | jq '{score, grade, findings: ((.findings // []) | length), metrics}'

tracker_health.reason: bd ready/list succeeded; epic soc-h22t and five child issues created

done_criteria: Release readiness artifact validates against schema and reports release_readiness_score >= 8.0 in official mode.
SIL, VIL, and HIL evidence are represented in readiness JSON with pass/fail/skip/waived semantics.
Official release audit validation rejects missing readiness or required HIL evidence unless waiver is explicit.
Local release gate and release docs describe the 8/10 requirement.
Release readiness tests, HIL tests, CI policy parity, contract compatibility, and release smoke pass.

test_levels.rationale: Release-process changes touch scripts, docs, schemas, workflows, and cross-host validation. L3 applies when HIL targets are configured and can be executed.
